prompt: Create a luxurious fantasy portrait of the Queen and the Serpent: a beautiful pale-skinned young queen reclining on an ornate gilded baroque bed inside a sunlit royal palace chamber, embraced by one enormous silver-white serpent coiled around her body like a protective throne. The queen has very long platinum-blonde hair flowing across red silk bedding, a delicate jeweled crown, soft regal makeup, and a languid, confident expression while gazing toward the viewer. She wears a deep crimson off-shoulder corset gown with intricate gold embroidery, beaded chains, gemstones, bracelets, and a dramatic slit revealing one bare leg; the fabric spreads across the bed in rich folds. The serpent has pearlescent metallic scales, a massive calm head resting beside her shoulder on the left, visible golden eyes, and a thick body forming one large coil around the foreground. Set the scene in an opulent palace bedroom with carved gold headboard, red velvet pillows, brocade curtains, marble columns, tall bright windows, and warm morning sunlight casting sparkling highlights across scales, jewelry, and fabric. Style: ultra-detailed cinematic fantasy realism, elegant and sensual but non-explicit, high-fashion editorial composition, soft volumetric light, shallow depth of field, 3:4 vertical frame, crisp textures, no text, no watermark, no extra limbs, no distorted anatomy.
